children.text: The little dog we have is the cutest in the world.
children.cn: 我们家的小狗是世界上最可爱的。
children.statement: 作者认为这只小狗非常可爱。
children.explanation: 文中用 'cutest in the world'（世界上最可爱）来形容它。

children.text: Small and playful, he's always by my side.
children.cn: 它既小巧又顽皮，总是待在我身边。
children.statement: 这只小狗很安静，不爱动。
children.explanation: 文中说它 'playful'（顽皮），意味着它很爱动。

children.text: "Play with me and love me. I want you with me always."
children.cn: “陪我玩，爱我。我想让你永远陪着我。”

children.text: But we can't have him for long.
children.cn: 但我们不能长久地拥有它。
children.statement: 这只狗会一直住在作者家里。
children.explanation: 文中说 'can't have him for long'（不能长久拥有）。

children.text: He'll be someone's eyes one day.
children.cn: 总有一天，它会成为某个人的眼睛。
children.statement: 这只狗将来会成为一只导盲犬。
children.explanation: 'be someone's eyes' 暗喻它将作为导盲犬帮助盲人。

children.text: I made a new friend. He was eighty years old, and he had no family.
children.cn: 我交了一个新朋友。他八十岁了，没有家人。
children.explanation: 文中说他 'eighty years old'（八十岁）。

children.text: He owned a ukulele. So I brought over my guitar.
children.cn: 他有一把尤克里里。于是我带去了我的吉他。
children.statement: 作者带了一把尤克里里去朋友家。
children.explanation: 作者带的是 'guitar'（吉他），朋友有 'ukulele'。

children.text: Together the two of us played.
children.explanation: 文中说 'Together the two of us played'。

children.text: We're not good enough for a show. But we didn't sound too bad at all.
children.cn: 我们弹得还不够好，没法演出。但听起来一点也不差。
children.explanation: 文中说 'didn't sound too bad at all'（一点也不差）。

children.text: At lunchtime, I saw the new kid. She sat on her own.
children.cn: 午饭时间，我看到了那个新来的孩子。她独自坐着。
children.statement: 那个新来的孩子和很多人坐在一起。
children.explanation: 文中说 'She sat on her own'（她独自坐着）。

children.text: She had only the words of a book for her lunch.
children.cn: 她只有书里的文字作为午餐（喻指她没带午饭，只在看书）。
children.explanation: 这是一种比喻，指她没有食物吃，只能看书消磨午餐时间。

children.text: I gave her half of my sandwich. And I had only half for me.
children.cn: 我分给她一半三明治。我自已也只有一半了。
children.statement: 作者分享了自己的午餐。
children.explanation: 文中说 'I gave her half of my sandwich'。

children.text: But after I ate it, I felt full.
children.cn: 但我吃完之后，感觉很饱（指精神上的满足）。
children.statement: 作者因为只吃了一半而感到非常饿。
children.explanation: 文中说 'I felt full'（我感觉很饱/很满足）。
